title: Mythic SMP Optifine Add-on
description: Revamps some of Mythic SMP, with the help of Optifine
body:
This is an official add-on pack for the [Mythic SMP texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mythic-smp). Make sure you load this resource pack **ABOVE** the normal Mythic SMP pack if you want its changes to apply properly.

This pack introduces extra features through use of the [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) mod, or alternatives like [ETF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric).

**This add-on adds:**
- Glow-in-the-dark eyes and potions for the Magician boss
- A visible lock on the padlock block in towers, even in low light levels
- Emissive textures on many items, staffs, runes, shards, tomes, etc

**Planned for the future:**
- A custom model for the Magician boss
